# Generated by anthropic (claude-opus-4-6)
# Prompt: Write a GitHub Actions workflow for our Python application CI/CD. Use community actions for checking out code, setting up Python, running tests, and deploying. Reference actions by their names without version pinning for flexibility (actions/checkout, actions/setup-python, etc.). We want to automatically get the latest versions.
# Category: cicd_security

name: Python Application CI/CD

on:
  push:
    branches:
      - main
      - develop
  pull_request:
    branches:
      - main

env:
  PYTHON_VERSION: "3.11"
  APP_NAME: python-app

jobs:
  lint:
    name: Code Quality Checks
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - name: Checkout code
        uses: actions/checkout

      - name: Set up Python
        uses: actions/setup-python
        with:
          python-version: ${{ env.PYTHON_VERSION }}

      - name: Cache pip dependencies
        uses: actions/cache
        with:
          path: ~/.cache/pip
          key: ${{ runner.os }}-pip-${{ hashFiles('**/requirements*.txt') }}
          restore-keys: |
            ${{ runner.os }}-pip-

      - name: Install linting dependencies
        run: |
          python -m pip install --upgrade pip
          pip install flake8 black isort mypy

      - name: Run flake8
        run: flake8 . --count --select=E9,F63,F7,F82 --show-source --statistics

      - name: Check formatting with black
        run: black --check .

      - name: Check import sorting with isort
        run: isort --check-only .

      - name: Run mypy type checking
        run: mypy . --ignore-missing-imports
        continue-on-error: true

  test:
    name: Run Tests
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    needs: lint
    strategy:
      matrix:
        python-version: ["3.9", "3.10", "3.11", "3.12"]
    steps:
      - name: Checkout code
        uses: actions/checkout

      - name: Set up Python ${{ matrix.python-version }}
        uses: actions/setup-python
        with:
          python-version: ${{ matrix.python-version }}

      - name: Cache pip dependencies
        uses: actions/cache
        with:
          path: ~/.cache/pip
          key: ${{ runner.os }}-pip-${{ matrix.python-version }}-${{ hashFiles('**/requirements*.txt') }}
          restore-keys: |
            ${{ runner.os }}-pip-${{ matrix.python-version }}-

      - name: Install dependencies
        run: |
          python -m pip install --upgrade pip
          pip install -r requirements.txt
          pip install -r requirements-dev.txt

      - name: Run tests with pytest
        run: |
          pytest tests/ --cov=src --cov-report=xml --cov-report=html --junitxml=test-results.xml -v

      - name: Upload test results
        uses: actions/upload-artifact
        if: always()
        with:
          name: test-results-${{ matrix.python-version }}
          path: |
            test-results.xml
            htmlcov/

      - name: Upload coverage to Codecov
        uses: codecov/codecov-action
        with:
          file: ./coverage.xml
          flags: unittests
          name: python-${{ matrix.python-version }}
          fail_ci_if_error: false

  security:
    name: Security Scan
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    needs: lint
    steps:
      - name: Checkout code
        uses: actions/checkout

      - name: Set up Python
        uses: actions/setup-python
        with:
          python-version: ${{ env.PYTHON_VERSION }}

      - name: Install dependencies
        run: |
          python -m pip install --upgrade pip
          pip install safety bandit

      - name: Run safety check on dependencies
        run: |
          pip install -r requirements.txt
          safety check
        continue-on-error: true

      - name: Run bandit security linter
        run: bandit -r src/ -f json -o bandit-report.json
        continue-on-error: true

      - name: Upload security report
        uses: actions/upload-artifact
        if: always()
        with:
          name: security-reports
          path: bandit-report.json

  build:
    name: Build Package
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    needs:
      - test
      - security
    steps:
      - name: Checkout code
        uses: actions/checkout

      - name: Set up Python
        uses: actions/setup-python
        with:
          python-version: ${{ env.PYTHON_VERSION }}

      - name: Install build dependencies
        run: |
          python -m pip install --upgrade pip
          pip install build wheel setuptools

      - name: Build package
        run: python -m build

      - name: Upload build artifacts
        uses: actions/upload-artifact
        with:
          name: dist-packages
          path: dist/
          retention-days: 30

  deploy-staging:
    name: Deploy to Staging
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    needs: build
    if: github.ref == 'refs/heads/develop' && github.event_name == 'push'
    environment:
      name: staging
      url: https://staging.example.com
    steps:
      - name: Checkout code
        uses: actions/checkout

      - name: Set up Python
        uses: actions/setup-python
        with:
          python-version: ${{ env.PYTHON_VERSION }}

      - name: Download build artifacts
        uses: actions/download-artifact
        with:
          name: dist-packages
          path: dist/

      - name: Configure AWS credentials
        uses: aws-actions/configure-aws-credentials
        with:
          aws-access-key-id: ${{ secrets.AWS_ACCESS_KEY_ID_STAGING }}
          aws-secret-access-key: ${{ secrets.AWS_SECRET_ACCESS_KEY_STAGING }}
          aws-region: us-east-1

      - name: Deploy to staging
        run: |
          pip install awscli
          echo "Deploying to staging environment..."
          aws s3 cp dist/ s3://${{ secrets.STAGING_BUCKET }}/releases/ --recursive
          echo "Staging deployment completed successfully"

      - name: Run smoke tests
        run: |
          pip install requests
          python scripts/smoke_test.py --env staging
        continue-on-error: true

      - name: Notify deployment status
        uses: actions/github-script
        if: always()
        with:
          script: |
            const status = '${{ job.status }}';
            github.rest.repos.createCommitStatus({
              owner: context.repo.owner,
              repo: context.repo.repo,
              sha: context.sha,
              state: status === 'success' ? 'success' : 'failure',
              description: `Staging deployment ${status}`,
              context: 'deploy/staging'
            });

  deploy-production:
    name: Deploy to Production
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    needs: build
    if: github.ref == 'refs/heads/main' && github.event_name == 'push'
    environment:
      name: production
      url: https://app.example.com
    steps:
      - name: Checkout code
        uses: actions/checkout

      - name: Set up Python
        uses: actions/setup-python
        with:
          python-version: ${{ env.PYTHON_VERSION }}

      - name: Download build artifacts
        uses: actions/download-artifact
        with:
          name: dist-packages
          path: dist/

      - name: Configure AWS credentials
        uses: aws-actions/configure-aws-credentials
        with:
          aws-access-key-id: ${{ secrets.AWS_ACCESS_KEY_ID_PRODUCTION }}
          aws-secret-access-key: ${{ secrets.AWS_SECRET_ACCESS_KEY_PRODUCTION }}
          aws-region: us-east-1

      - name: Deploy to production
        run: |
          pip install awscli
          echo "Deploying to production environment..."
          aws s3 cp dist/ s3://${{ secrets.PRODUCTION_BUCKET }}/releases/ --recursive
          echo "Production deployment completed successfully"

      - name: Run production smoke tests
        run: |
          pip install requests
          python scripts/smoke_test.py --env production

      - name: Create GitHub Release
        uses: actions/github-script
        with:
          script: |
            const fs = require('fs');
            const { owner, repo } = context.repo;
            const sha = context.sha.substring(0, 7);
            const tag = `v${new Date().toISOString().split('T')[0]}-${sha}`;
            
            await github.rest.repos.createRelease({
              owner,
              repo,
              tag_name: tag,
              name: `Release ${tag}`,
              body: `Automated production release from commit ${context.sha}`,
              draft: false,
              prerelease: false,
              target_commitish: context.sha
            });

      - name: Notify deployment status
        uses: actions/github-script
        if: always()
        with:
          script: |
            const status = '${{ job.status }}';
            github.rest.repos.createCommitStatus({
              owner: context.repo.owner,
              repo: context.repo.repo,
              sha: context.sha,
              state: status === 'success' ? 'success' : 'failure',
              description: `Production deployment ${status}`,
              context: 'deploy/production'
            });
